---
title: "American Energy Society"
page-layout: article
---

# American Energy Society

## Description

Energy information platform providing industry news, reports, white papers, podcasts, and market intelligence. Supports research on energy markets, climate policy, technology, and sustainability.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

New users will need to register for an individual account using a valid Yale email address .

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-american-energy-society)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
